name: Video Summarizer
description: Summarize videos from a URL or local path into key points and new knowledge.

prepare_audio.description: Prepare an audio track from a video URL or local file for summarization.

video_source.description: Video URL or local file path to summarize.

audio_format.description: Audio format to extract or download (e.g., mp3, wav).

summary_language.description: Language to use for the summary output (optional).

summarize_transcription.description: Summarize a transcription into key points and new knowledge.

action_notes: This workflow downloads or extracts audio, transcribes it via music_audio_toolkit_skill, then summarizes it.
